summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Discord Roleplay Game Master Bot new features: /Inventar endpoint, /TW (Tagwechsel) endpoint, and GM scene-response with violence/lethality rules, non-repetitive German writing style, and character background enforcement. All 14 pytest tests passed (100% success rate). Manual verification confirmed all features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/sandbox/inventar/{pc_id} returns categorized inventory with finances and properties
Inventar endpoint returns 404 for non-existent PC
Tagwechsel calculates wages based on profession (Schmied gets 6 Silber for Schmiedearbeit)
Tagwechsel deducts rent from properties (8 Silber for Schmiede)
Tagwechsel correctly increments campaign day counter (Day 7 confirmed)
Tagwechsel creates default finances for PC without prior finances
POST /api/gm/scene-response enforces character background (farmer failed sword-fight with SG 14)
GM scene-response produces injury markers [ÄNDERUNG: Charakter - Zustand]
GM scene-response displays transparent dice rolls (1W20 = X, SG Y, Ergebnis)
GM writing style avoids banned AI phrases (kalte Luft, feuchter Atem, etc.)
GM writing style is specific, concrete, and scene-driven
seed_data_creation: Created test PCs: Heinrich der Schmied (ID: 158e58e5-a7c8-40cf-acd3-3b31b0a2b2e4), Hans der Bauer (ID: 004fdcc4-7b4e-438f-94d6-cb2407ba917d) with inventory, finances, and properties for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Inventar, Tagwechsel, GM scene-response with violence/lethality/background enforcement/writing style) are working correctly. Test campaign ID: 2b18dad2-4484-4ab6-bb65-0667f35fff19. Campaign day is now at 7. Test PCs created for future testing.

tagwechsel_endpoint.wage_calculation: Schmied profession correctly identified, wage: 6 Silber (Schmiedearbeit)
tagwechsel_endpoint.rent_deduction: Property rent correctly deducted: 8 Silber for Schmiede am Markt

background_enforcement.test_case: Farmer with no combat experience tried elegant fencing move
background_enforcement.result: High difficulty (SG 14) applied, farmer failed (rolled 2), received injury [ÄNDERUNG: Hans der Bauer – schwer verletzt]

writing_style.quality: Specific, concrete, scene-driven prose with NPC dialogue in quotes
